assertions.title: Authenticated WebSocket upgrade succeeds through GET /api/ws

steps.action: Register and log in via Playwright WebAuthn virtual authenticator
steps.expected: Session cookies choir_refresh and choir_access are set
steps.observed: Cookies choir_refresh and choir_access are set

steps.expected: Receive a frame from the sandbox

assertions.title: Missing or invalid auth cannot open GET /api/ws

steps.expected: Connection is denied and does not upgrade
steps.observed: WebSocket connection failed with error (closed before upgrade)

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed. Authenticated proxy WebSocket connection successfully relays messages from the placeholder sandbox. Unauthenticated connection is properly denied.
